issue_title: Selecting a different language in the language modal has no effect until clicking off the element
issue_body_preview:
Seen in Firefox, changing the language at the bottom of the page via the drop-down has no effect until the dropdown element is no longer in focus. This also affects the suggested language popup

To replicate:

1. Go to https://www.datenanfragen.de/
2. Select Language from dropdown: English

See that
test_description_zh:
1. 打开首页（https://www.datenanfragen.de/ 或对应本地页面）
2. 找到页面底部的语言选择下拉框
3. 点击下拉框并选择一种不同的语言（例如选择 English）
4. 观察在选择语言后、下拉框仍处于聚焦状态时页面是否立即响应语言切换
expected_result_zh: 在下拉框中选择新语言后，页面应立即切换到对应语言，无需额外点击页面其他区域或使下拉框失焦。语言弹窗建议中的语言选择也应立即生效。
